SOLUTIONS.TITLE: Smart Home Solutions Tailored for You
SOLUTIONS.SUBTITLE_1: Integrate your devices or add new smart technology to make your home more comfortable, secure, and

S1.TITLE: Integration
S1.TEXT: Use devices you already own, like Alexa or Google Home, to control your home effortlessly.

S2.TITLE: Lighting & Power
S2.TEXT: Automate bulbs, switches, and plugs to save energy and create the perfect ambiance.

S3.TITLE: Climate & Comfort
S3.TEXT: Smart thermostats, heaters, and fans keep your home comfortable and energy-efficient.

S4.TITLE: Security & Safety
S4.TEXT: Protect your home with cameras, sensors, smart locks, and real-time alerts.

S5.TITLE: Custom Automations
S5.TEXT: Create personalized scenes and routines to make your home smarter and simpler.

PLAN_CARDS.NOTE: (*) Please note that smart devices are not included in the service price and are sold separately.

P1.TITLE: Starter
P1.IDEAL: Perfect for first-time smart home users.

P2.TITLE: Essentials
P2.IDEAL: Great for upgrading key areas of your home.

P3.TITLE: Full Smart
P3.IDEAL: Designed for a fully connected smart home.

P4.TITLE: Customize
P4.F2: Add switches, cameras, plugs & tailor-made automations.
P4.IDEAL: Perfect for a personalized smart home setup.

CARE_PLANS.TITLE: Keep Your Home Smart

ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.P1_1: At ZentrixNest, we transform modern homes and spaces into intelligent, connected, and efficient environments. We specialize in
ABOUT.P1_HIGHLIGHT: smart home automation and device configuration
ABOUT.P1_2: , integrating lighting, climate control, security, voice control, and remote monitoring from your smartphone.
ABOUT.P2: Our approach combines advanced technology, elegant design, and secure solutions, tailored to each client's unique needs. Whether you are starting from scratch or upgrading your current setup, we help you create a home that is more comfortable, secure, and efficient.
ABOUT.P3: At ZentrixNest, we believe a smart home isn't just controlled—it's enjoyed, which is why we provide intuitive, reliable, and aesthetically elegant solutions that seamlessly fit your lifestyle.
